title: Gora Automatikoa
overview: When Galindo, an acid unsuccessful film director, sees the triumph of "La gallina Turuleca" at the 2021 Goya ceremony, he discovers that there is a way to win a Goya automatically: to be the only animated film that comes in. Then Galindo decides to make an animated film to get a much desired Goya. For this he goes in search of his old companions of film adventures: Pablo and Dharma.
